'''Vaartsoon''' was a [[Commando/Legends|commando]] for [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]]. He was [[Evacuation of Ciutric|sent]] to [[Ciutric IV|Ciutric]] with several commando squads by [[Ysanne Isard]] to either capture or kill [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]].

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 33|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 33]] {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
